framing: Statistical screens, not conclusions. Every signal shows its sources and confidence; the judgment is the reader's.

signals.headline: 16 precincts shed 18+ points of presidential-year turnout between 2020 and 2024
signals.body: Steepest: precinct 0952 (61% → 30% of registered voters). Heaviest concentration: CD-29 (4 precincts). Same-type cycles compared (presidential vs presidential), registration-adjusted, precincts under 500 registered excluded.
signals.confidenceNote: Official certified counts; the screen measures change, not its cause — boundary-stable join covers 1,170 of 1,172 precincts.
